BrandLibrary.title: Brand Identity Library
BrandLibrary.description: Manage brand logos, trademarks, and other visual identity features
BrandLibrary.dialogProcessingDescription: Enter the logo name, type, reference images, and related tags. After saving, vectors will be generated automatically and the processing status will be updated.
BrandLibrary.createProcessingSuccess: Brand identity created, vector generation has started
BrandLibrary.updateProcessingSuccess: Brand identity updated, vector regeneration has started
BrandLibrary.retryOnlyFailed: Only failed brand identities can be retried
BrandLibrary.retryFailed: Failed to retry brand identity processing
BrandLibrary.batchEnableFailed: Batch enable failed, please retry later
BrandLibrary.batchDisableFailed: Batch disable failed, please retry later
BrandLibrary.batchDeleteFailed: Batch delete failed, please retry later
BrandLibrary.emptyFiltered: No brand identities match the current filters

dialog.uploadHint: Upload at least 2-3 brand images. To improve AI recognition accuracy, include as many logo versions as possible (standard color, monochrome black/white, horizontal/vertical layouts, reversed versions). Transparent or solid backgrounds are preferred.
dialog.linkedTagsHint: These tags will be automatically applied when recognition matches

confirmDialog.title: Action Confirmation
confirmDialog.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone, and linked tags will not be automatically removed.
confirmDialog.disableDescription: Are you sure you want to disable "{name}"? After disabling, newly uploaded assets will not automatically recognize this entry and apply linked tags. Already tagged assets will not be affected.

batchDialog.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {count} items? This action cannot be undone, and linked tags will not be automatically removed.
batchDialog.enableDescription: Are you sure you want to enable the selected {count} items? Once enabled, they will participate in AI auto-recognition and tagging.
batchDialog.disableDescription: Are you sure you want to disable the selected {count} items? After disabling, newly uploaded assets will not automatically recognize these entries and apply linked tags. Already tagged assets will not be affected.

uploadErrors.fileTooLarge: Each image must be 50MB or smaller
uploadErrors.totalTooLarge: The total size of new uploads must stay under 50MB
uploadErrors.imageLoadFailed: Failed to read the image. Please try again.
uploadErrors.compressionFailed: Failed to compress the image. Please try again.
uploadErrors.compressionTargetUnreachable: The image is still larger than 5MB after compression. Please choose a smaller one.
uploadErrors.invalidAssets: Selected assets are missing valid download URLs
uploadErrors.selectFromLibraryFailed: Failed to select images from asset library, please retry

validation.typeDeleted: Current type has been deleted, please select a valid type
validation.imagesRequired: Please upload at least 1 identity image
validation.totalTooLarge: The total size of new uploads must stay under 50MB
validation.imagesExpired: Image list expired, please refresh and retry
validation.keepAtLeastOneImage: Please keep at least 1 identity image
validation.tagsRequired: Please select at least 1 linked tag

processingErrors.logoNotFound: Brand identity no longer exists or has been deleted
processingErrors.noReferenceImages: No reference images are available for vector generation
processingErrors.imageFetchFailed: Failed to read the reference image
processingErrors.jinaRequestFailed: Failed to generate embeddings with Jina

IpLibrary.title: IP Character Library
IpLibrary.description: Manage brand mascots, virtual characters, and other IP features
IpLibrary.filteredEmpty: No IP characters match the current filters
IpLibrary.dialogProcessingDescription: Enter the IP name, type, reference images, feature description and related tags. After saving, vectors will be generated automatically and the processing status will be updated.
IpLibrary.createProcessingSuccess: IP character created, vector generation has started
IpLibrary.updateProcessingSuccess: IP character updated, vector regeneration has started
IpLibrary.retryOnlyFailed: Only failed IP characters can be retried
IpLibrary.retryFailed: Failed to retry IP character processing

validation.typeDeleted: Current type has been deleted, please select a valid type
validation.imagesRequired: Please upload at least 1 IP image
validation.totalTooLarge: The total size of new uploads must stay under 50MB
validation.imagesExpired: Image list expired, please refresh and retry
validation.keepAtLeastOneImage: Please keep at least 1 IP image
validation.tagsRequired: Please select at least 1 linked tag

IpLibrary.batchDisableFailed: Batch disable failed, please retry later
IpLibrary.batchDeleteFailed: Batch delete failed, please retry later
IpLibrary.emptyFiltered: No IP characters match the current filters

dialog.uploadHint: Upload 3-5 reference images covering different poses and expressions when possible. If there are seasonal or co-branded variants, keep them within the same entry.
dialog.linkedTagsHint: These tags will be automatically applied when a match is found
dialog.notesPlaceholder: For example: origin, licensing notes, etc.
dialog.descriptionHint: Describe the distinctive visual traits of this IP that do not easily change.
dialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Example: A red fox wearing blue goggles with a lightning mark on its cheek.

confirmDialog.disableDescription: Are you sure you want to disable "{name}"? After disabling, newly uploaded assets will not automatically recognize this entry and apply linked tags. Already tagged assets will not be affected.

BrandClassify.pageDescription: After uploading a product image, the system will first call the detection service to find potential logo areas, then use Jina + Qdrant for similarity search.
BrandClassify.statsDescription: Only counting enabled and completed vector processing data
BrandClassify.uploadProductImage: Please upload product image to classify
BrandClassify.noReferenceLogos: No available completed brand reference vectors currently
BrandClassify.uploadHint: After uploading a product image, detection boxes and the final matched logo will be displayed here.
BrandClassify.resultHint: The result area will show the winning detection box, final brand name, and top 3 similar logos.
BrandClassify.noConfidentMatchDesc: The current best candidate is not stable enough, therefore judged as no confident match.

errors.fileTooLarge: Each image must be 50MB or smaller
errors.imageLoadFailed: Failed to load image. Please retry.
errors.compressionTargetUnreachable: Image still exceeds 5MB after compression. Please choose a smaller image.

IpClassify.pageDescription: After uploading an image, the system will first call the detection service to find potential IP figure areas, then use multimodal embedding to retrieve image and description vectors, and give the final result after aggregating by crop and modality.
IpClassify.statsDescription: Only counting enabled and completed vector processing data
IpClassify.uploadImageFirst: Please upload an image to classify first
IpClassify.noReferenceIps: No available completed IP reference vectors currently
IpClassify.uploadHint: After uploading an image, detection boxes and the final matched IP will be displayed here.
IpClassify.resultHint: The result area will show the winning detection box, final IP name, and top 3 similar results.
IpClassify.noConfidentMatchDesc: The current best candidate is not stable enough, therefore judged as no confident match.

errors.fileTooLarge: Each image must be 50MB or smaller
errors.imageLoadFailed: Failed to load image. Please retry.
errors.compressionTargetUnreachable: Image still exceeds 5MB after compression. Please choose a smaller image.
errors.canvasNotSupported: Browser does not support Canvas cropping

Dashboard.title: AI Auto-Tagging in Progress
Dashboard.remainingTasks: Remaining {count} / {total} items, estimated {minutes} minutes to complete
Dashboard.emptyTagErrorMsg: No tag system yet. Please create one first~
Dashboard.noAppropriateTagErrorMsg: There are no suitable tags in the current tag system

Global.title: Tagging Switch
Global.enableTaggingDesc: Enabled, AI will tag assets based on configuration and tag system

TaggingMode.title: Tagging Mode
TaggingMode.directDesc: AI tags are applied directly to assets
TaggingMode.reviewDesc: AI tags require manual review before applying
TaggingMode.firstTimeRecommendationDesc: Manual review can help evaluate AI tagging effectiveness. Switch to direct application mode once accuracy meets requirements

MatchingStrategy.title: Matching Strategy
MatchingStrategy.existingTagsDesc: Match from existing tags in the system
MatchingStrategy.filePathMatchingDesc: Tag matching based on the file path where assets are located
MatchingStrategy.assetNameMatchingDesc: Analyze key information in file names for matching

TriggerTiming.title: Trigger Timing
TriggerTiming.autoRealtimeTaggingDesc: Execute AI intelligent parsing and automatic tagging immediately after file upload
TriggerTiming.manualTriggerTaggingDesc: Support users with edit permissions in the asset library to manually select files or folders for batch tagging
TriggerTiming.scheduledTaggingDesc: Scan untagged files periodically and automatically execute tagging

ApplicationScope.title: Application Scope
ApplicationScope.allAssetsDesc: Apply to all assets in the system
ApplicationScope.selectScopeDesc: Click to select the asset scope for enabling AI auto-tagging
ApplicationScope.currentAndNewAssets: Current folder and newly uploaded assets
ApplicationScope.onlySelectedScope: 💡 Only assets within the selected scope will undergo AI auto-tagging

ConfirmDialog.enableWithoutTagsDescription: AI auto-tagging requires a tag system for intelligent tagging. There is currently no tag system in the system. Please create a tag system before enabling this feature~
ConfirmDialog.enableWithTagsDescription: AI will automatically analyze asset content based on your tag system and recommend suitable tags for assets. Recommended results will be displayed in the "AI Recommended Tags" field, and you can review and choose to apply them to formal tags.
ConfirmDialog.disableWithoutTasksDescription: After disabling, newly uploaded assets will no longer generate recommended tags based on your tag system.
ConfirmDialog.disableWithTasksDescription: There are currently {count} tagging tasks in progress, ongoing tasks will not be affected and will continue to complete. After disabling, newly uploaded assets will no longer generate recommended tags based on the tag system.
ConfirmDialog.enableHint: The system currently supports tagging based on general image recognition content by default
ConfirmDialog.disableHint: AI smart tags feature will still provide general content recognition for assets normally
ConfirmDialog.autoRealtimeOption: Generate recommended tags for newly uploaded assets
ConfirmDialog.autoRealtimeDescription: Uploaded assets will automatically get AI tag recommendations

Review.rejectConfirmDescription: Confirm to delete the AI tagging record of the asset "{assetName}"? This operation cannot be recovered, please proceed with caution.
Review.batchRejectConfirmDescription: Confirm to delete the AI tagging record of {assetNum} assets? This operation cannot be recovered, please proceed with caution.
Review.batchApproveSuccess: Batch added to asset tags successfully
Review.batchApproveFailed: Failed to batch add to asset tags
Review.batchRejectSuccess: Batch deleted AI tagging records successfully
Review.batchRejectFailed: Failed to batch delete AI tagging records
Review.enableAutoTaggingDesc: Enable AI auto-tagging engine now, automatically tag assets precisely based on tag system~
Review.pageInputPlaceholder: Enter page number, press Enter to jump

Access.noPermissionsConfigured: No other permissions configured. Click the "Add Members" button above to start configuration
Access.fullManagementPermission: Full management permissions, including configuration and member management
Access.reviewPermission: Can view and review tagging results, cannot modify configurations

Test.testDescriptionText1: • AI will use existing configurations and system tag system to tag specified assets
Test.testDescriptionText2: • Please ensure tag system is created; You can also use AI assistant to quickly generate industry tag system
Test.testDescriptionText3: • AI matching configuration in test is for testing only and does not affect AI tagging settings
Test.testOnlyDescription: For testing only, files and results will not be saved or entered into enterprise library
Test.noAssetsSelectedInfo: No assets selected or returned format is incorrect
Test.taggingTasksStarted: Successfully initiated tagging tasks for {successCount} assets
Test.taggingTasksPartialSuccess: Tagging task initiation completed: {successCount} successful, {failedCount} failed
Test.startTaggingError: Error occurred while initiating tagging tasks

TestClient.pollingDescription: Checking status every 2 seconds, results will be displayed automatically when completed

Common.taskAddedToQueue: Task has been added back to queue
